PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-001.rule: Interactive elements must be keyboard operable
PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-001.notes: Browse Files and Remove buttons implemented as <button type='button'>. File input hidden and triggered via JS.

PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-002.rule: Focus indicators must be visible on keyboard focus

PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-003.rule: Interactive elements must have accessible names
PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-003.notes: Remove button requires aria-label='Remove [filename]'. Browse Files uses visible text. Drop zone requires aria-label='File drop zone'.

PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-004.rule: Disabled state must be communicated to assistive technology
PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-004.notes: aria-disabled='true' on root elements. Pointer events disabled via CSS.

PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-005.rule: Error messages must be associated with their input
PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-005.notes: File item error row uses role='alert'. aria-describedby association recommended for production.

PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-006.rule: Loading state must be announced to assistive technology
PLATFORM-CODE-A11Y-006.notes: Loading file item should include role='status' or aria-label describing upload progress.

PLATFORM-CODE-TOKEN-001.rule: Component CSS must use component-level semantic tokens, not primitive tokens
PLATFORM-CODE-TOKEN-001.notes: All CSS custom properties are defined at component level with fallbacks. Tokens not yet in token.css — see analysis.md.

PLATFORM-CODE-STATE-001.rule: All Figma states must be implemented in CSS

PLATFORM-CODE-FOCUS-001.rule: Focus ring must be visible on keyboard navigation
PLATFORM-CODE-FOCUS-001.strategy: :focus-visible with outline on all interactive elements
PLATFORM-CODE-FOCUS-001.notes: Source does not specify keyboard-only focus; :focus-visible chosen per accessibility best practice.

PLATFORM-CODE-FILE-UPLOAD-001.notes: RTL handled via [dir=rtl] selectors. Drop Zone requires no CSS changes (centered layout).
